title: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Stop Sneezing
premise_summary: crocodile tries to roar but sneezes instead
cover_description: A crocodile mid-sneeze with his mouth wide open, eyes squeezed shut, and a tiny mouse holding a giant tissue box behind him
script:
[TITLE: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Stop Sneezing]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sound_effect_comedy]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, tentative] Oh! What’s that big green bump? [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] It is NOT a bump, tiny terror. It is I, the mighty Croc! [STING: villain_entrance]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: excited] Ooooh! Can you roar like thunder? [STING: buildup_short]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] I shall roar so loud— *achoo!* [STING: medium_hit]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] Eek! That was a sneeze! [STING: mouse_panic]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive, scrambling] I meant to do that! Now— *achoo! ACHOO!* [STING: big_crash]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious, pointed] Two sneezes? That’s not roaring! [STING: slide_whistle]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] Fine! I’ll roar ONE MORE— *ACHOOOOO!* [STING: splat]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha, quiet] That was three sneezes. [STING: silence]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: deflated, stunned] [PUNCHLINE]I am the mighty... *sniffle*... snotty Croc.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: deflation]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: delighted] Gesundheit! [STING: victory]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A crocodile mid-sneeze with his mouth wide open, eyes squeezed shut, and a tiny mouse holding a giant tissue box behind him]
[PREMISE: crocodile tries to roar but sneezes instead]
